title: iam-jit backup metadata table (cross-product)
description:
The `<product>_backup_metadata` SQLite table embedded inside every `*bounce backup` output. Pinned cross-product key set so a single restore-checker tool can validate a backup from any Bounce product identically.

The table is a key/value store: every row has a `key` TEXT PRIMARY KEY + a `value` TEXT NOT NULL. This schema constrains the canonical key set + the wire shape each value uses. Extra keys are allowed (additive evolution); a restore-checker MUST tolerate them.

Authoritative writers: internal/store/backup.go (kbounce, dbounce, gbounce — identical key set per [[cross-product-agent-parity]]); src/iam_jit/bouncer/backup.py (ibounce, when the SQLite-backed config-store ships).

table_name.description: Per-product table name. The presence of the matching table magic confirms a backup file was produced by the corresponding Bounce product.

keys.description: Canonical key set. Every backup MUST set the required keys; additional keys are tolerated.

ibounce_version.description: Per-product binary version stamp. Exactly one of {ibounce_version, kbounce_version, dbounce_version, gbounce_version} is present, matching the product.

created_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp the backup was created.

source_hostname_hash.description: sha256[:12] of the source host's hostname. Privacy-preserving attribution: a reviewer can tell two backups from different hosts apart without leaking the literal hostname. Matches the convention used in *bounce-config exports + diagnostics manifest provenance.

schema_version.description: Per-product store-schema version (stringified integer). Equal-or-newer importer schema is always accepted; older importer refuses (older binary cannot read a newer-schema backup). Note: this names the STORE schema version, NOT the wire-format `schema_version` used in *bounce-config exports.

included_audit.description: Stringified boolean. "true"/"false" — whether the backup includes the audit table.

included_prompts.description: Stringified boolean. Whether the backup includes the sync-prompts table.
